notes: Grammaticalization of the “s-aorist injunctive” as separate mood with optional future reference.
Loss of imperfect destroys inherited perfective-imperfective aspect opposition; possible incipient aorist/perfect syncretism.
Creation of periphrastic verbal forms by means of instrumental and a form of *bhuH-.
Full paradigm difficult to reconstruct; Italic *fwe/o-, *fus- compared with Celtic *be-, *bis-.
